query: SELECT i.id, i.codigo, i.titulo, i.asignadoAId, u1.name as asignadoNombre, i.residenteId, u2.name as residenteNombre, i.especialidadId FROM items i LEFT JOIN users u1 ON i.asignadoAId = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON i.residenteId = u2.id WHERE i.numeroInterno IN (19, 20, 21, 22, 23) ORDER BY i.numeroInterno;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3B47TRBhQthMPN1.da4a966d722d --database LjHhpq7m8HsaWSJ2BF6kdt --execute SELECT i.id, i.codigo, i.titulo, i.asignadoAId, u1.name as asignadoNombre, i.residenteId, u2.name as residenteNombre, i.especialidadId FROM items i LEFT JOIN users u1 ON i.asignadoAId = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON i.residenteId = u2.id WHERE i.numeroInterno IN (19, 20, 21, 22, 23) ORDER BY i.numeroInterno;
